nasb.text: Afterward the sons of Judah went down to fight against the Canaanites living in the hill country and in the Negev and in the lowland.

esv.text: And afterward the men of Judah went down to fight against the Canaanites who lived in the hill country, in the Negeb, and in the lowland.

cnv.text: 後來，猶大人下去，與住在山地、南地和高原的迦南人交戰。

ccb.text: 随后，他们下去攻打住在山区、南地和丘陵的迦南人，
